prediction.chief_complaint: left index finger laceration from kitchen knife
plan: clean and irrigate wound, close with 4-0 nylon simple interrupted sutures
keep clean and dry for 24 hours then wash gently with soap and water
apply thin layer of bacitracin ointment twice daily and re-cover
no soaking until sutures come out
watch for redness, warmth, pus, streaking, fever and call if any
